event: The duel of Peresvet and Chelubai before the Battle of Kulikovo
description: Two mounted warriors clash in combat, their lances crossed in a dramatic X-shape at the center. The warrior on the left rides a red-caparisoned horse and wears red armor, while the warrior on the right, seen from behind, rides a black horse and wears dark armor with a helmet. Both lances pierce their opponents. The composition is dynamic and symmetrical, with the crossed lances creating the focal point. Wings or wing-like decorative elements appear in the upper corners. A green grassy field extends below the horses. The style is highly detailed and illustrative.
